title: Smoky Chestnut Skillet
description: A flavorful and savory dish featuring smoky chestnuts and crispy croatian skillet-fried ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the skillet over medium heat.
Cook the Croatian Bacon until crispy, then set aside.
Add the sliced sausage to the skillet and cook until browned.
Add the chopped onion and diced potatoes to the skillet and cook until the potatoes are tender.
Add the sliced chestnuts to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Push the ingredients to one side of the skillet and crack in the eggs.
Scramble the eggs until cooked through, then mix with the other ingredients.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
